title: Bernardo Silva confirms Man City summer exit
summary: Bernardo Silva, Manchester City captain, has announced his departure from the club at the end of this season when his contract expires. The move marks a significant transition for the Premier League champions.
content: Bernardo Silva has announced he will leave Manchester City this summer.

zh.title: 伯纳多·席尔瓦确认曼城夏季离队
zh.summary: 曼彻斯特城队长伯纳多·席尔瓦宣布将在本赛季末合同到期时离开该俱乐部。这一举动标志着英超冠军的重大转变。

title: 👕These kits put soccer's underdogs on the map
summary: Lower-league soccer clubs rarely compete with elite teams, but three standout clubs have gained widespread attention through distinctive and eye-catching kit designs. Their innovative uniforms have become a defining feature that sets them apart in professional soccer.
content: Few lower-league clubs could ever take on soccer's giants, but when it comes to attention-grabbing kits, these three are in a league of their own.

zh.title: 这些球衣让足球黑马崭露头角
zh.summary: 低级别足球俱乐部很少能与精英球队竞争，但三支杰出的俱乐部通过独特醒目的球衣设计获得了广泛关注。他们创新的制服已成为在职业足球中脱颖而出的标志特征。

title: NJ governor: FIFA should pay for WC train fare
summary: New Jersey Governor Mikie Sherrill and U.S. Senator Chuck Schumer are calling on FIFA to contribute to World Cup transit and security costs. The governor argues FIFA should help fund transportation infrastructure rather than leaving costs to fans attending matches.
content: New Jersey Governor Mikie Sherrill on Wednesday joined U.S. Senator Chuck Schumer in calling on FIFA to contribute toward World Cup transit security costs.

zh.title: 新泽西州州长：国际足联应为世界杯列车票价埋单
zh.summary: 新泽西州州长米基·谢里尔和美国参议员查克·舒默呼吁国际足联为世界杯交通和安全费用做出贡献。州长主张国际足联应该帮助资助运输基础设施，而不是将成本转嫁给参赛球迷。

title: Ronaldo suffers stomach pains, vomits during game
summary: Cristiano Ronaldo experienced stomach issues during Al Nassr's 1-0 victory over Al-Ettifaq, playing the full 90 minutes despite visible discomfort. The incident raised concerns about the player's wellbeing during the match.
content: Cristiano Ronaldo endured stomach pains while playing 90 minutes of Al Nassr's 1-0 league victory over Al-Ettifaq on Wednesday night.

zh.title: 罗纳尔多在比赛中胃痛、呕吐
zh.summary: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多在纳斯尔队1-0战胜艾蒂法克队的比赛中遭遇胃部不适，尽管明显感到不适仍踢满全场90分钟。这一事件引发了人们对这位球员在比赛期间健康状况的担忧。

title: Neymar plays down talk about a move to MLS
summary: Neymar has dismissed speculation about a potential transfer to Major League Soccer and remains committed to completing his contract with Santos. The star player intends to stay with his current club despite international interest.
content: Neymar intends to see out his Santos contract despite transfer interest from the MLS.

zh.title: 内马尔淡化转会美国职业足球大联盟的传言
zh.summary: 内马尔否认了关于可能转会美国职业足球大联盟的猜测，并表示致力于完成与桑托斯的合同。尽管有国际关注，这位明星球员打算留在现有的俱乐部。

title: Captain Silva to leave Man City at end of season
summary: Manchester City captain Bernardo Silva will depart the club when his contract expires at the conclusion of the current season. The departure marks the end of a significant era for the Premier League champions.
content: Manchester City captain Bernardo Silva will leave the club when his contract expires at the end of this season.

zh.title: 队长席尔瓦赛季末将离开曼城
zh.summary: 曼城队长伯纳多·席尔瓦将在本赛季末合同到期时离开俱乐部。这次离开标志着这支英超冠军球队一个重要时代的终结。

title: Bellingham says Camavinga red card 'a joke' as Real fury grows
summary: Real Madrid's Jude Bellingham criticized the red card issued to teammate Eduardo Camavinga during their 4-3 Champions League loss to Bayern Munich, calling the decision unjustified. The controversial dismissal has sparked growing frustration within the club.
content: Real Madrid's Jude Bellingham says the decision to send off team-mate Eduardo Camavinga during their 4-3 Champions League loss to Bayern Munich was "a joke".

zh.title: 贝林厄姆称卡玛文加红牌是"笑话" 皇马怒火升温
zh.summary: 皇马球员贝林厄姆对队友卡玛文加在欧冠对拜仁慕尼黑4:3失利中获得的红牌提出批评，称这个判罚不合理。这张争议的红牌在球队内引发了日益增长的不满。

title: Attack, attack, attack: Meet the team whose tactics have to be seen to be believed
summary: NEC has become known for their aggressive, attacking style of play and currently sit third in the Dutch Eredivisie while advancing to the Dutch Cup final. Their offensive-minded tactics are proving highly effective this season.
content: NEC have the most attacking, aggressive style around, and it's working as they sit third in the Dutch Eredivisie and are into the final of the Dutch Cup.

zh.title: 进攻、进攻、进攻：认识这支战术风格非看不可的球队
zh.summary: NEC以其积极的进攻型踢法而闻名，目前在荷甲排名第三，并已晋级荷兰杯决赛。他们的进攻型战术在本赛季证明了非常有效。

title: Northern Ireland to face World Cup-bound France
summary: Northern Ireland will play a friendly match against two-time world champion France in Lille as France prepares for the upcoming World Cup campaign. The fixture provides France with competitive preparation before the tournament.
content: Northern Ireland will face two-time world champions France in a friendly in Lille in the lead-up to the latter's World Cup campaign.

zh.title: 北爱尔兰将对阵备战世界杯的法国队
zh.summary: 北爱尔兰将在里尔与两次世界冠军法国进行友谊赛，以帮助法国为即将到来的世界杯做准备。这场比赛将为法国提供宝贵的赛前热身。

title: How Wubben-Moy has stepped into Williamson's shoes
summary: England defender Lotte Wubben-Moy impressed in a rare starting opportunity during Tuesday's victory over Spain, filling in for the absent Leah Williamson. Her strong performance demonstrated her capability at the international level.
content: England defender Lotte Wubben-Moy took her chance when she was handed a rare start in Tuesday's victory over Spain in Leah Williamson's absence.

zh.title: 乌本-莫伊如何接替威廉森的位置
zh.summary: 英格兰后卫洛蒂·乌本-莫伊在周二对西班牙的胜利中获得难得的首发机会时表现出色，填补了缺席的莉亚·威廉森的空缺。她强劲的表现证明了她在国际水平上的能力。

title: Fifa blamed as World Cup trains set to cost $100
summary: New Jersey Governor Mikie Sherrill has accused FIFA of failing to provide funding for World Cup transportation, leaving fans to bear the cost of expensive train fares. The dispute highlights disagreements over tournament infrastructure funding.
content: New Jersey Governor Mikie Sherrill accuses Fifa of failing to provide funding, which means fans must foot the bill for high transport costs at the World Cup this summer.

zh.title: 因世界杯列车费用高达100美元，国际足联遭指责
zh.summary: 新泽西州州长米基·谢里尔指责国际足联未能为世界杯运输提供资金，导致球迷承担昂贵列车票价的成本。这场争议突显了对赛事基础设施资金的意见分歧。

title: Transfer rumors, news: Newcastle to bring Mourinho back to Premier League?
summary: Newcastle United is reportedly considering replacing manager Eddie Howe with Jose Mourinho in a potential managerial change. The move would bring the Portuguese manager back to English football after his previous success in the Premier League.
content: Newcastle United could sack manager Eddie Howe and turn to Jose Mourinho. Transfer Talk has the latest.

zh.title: 转会流言：纽卡斯尔考虑邀请穆里尼奥重返英超
zh.summary: 纽卡斯尔联队据报正在考虑用何塞·穆里尼奥来取代主教练埃迪·豪。这一举措将使这位葡萄牙籍教练在其之前在英超取得的成功后重返英式足球。

title: How qualifying for Champions League could affect Man Utd's loanees
summary: Manchester United's pursuit of Champions League qualification could complicate their strategy regarding loaned players like Andre Onana and Marcus Rashford. Qualifying for Europe would make these players less attractive to potential buyers this summer.
content: Man Utd want to qualify for the Champions League but if they do it will make Andre Onana and Marcus Rashford harder to sell.

zh.title: 曼联获得欧冠资格如何影响租借球员
zh.summary: 曼联追求欧冠资格可能会使他们对租借球员的策略变得复杂,包括安德烈·奥纳纳和马库斯·拉什福德等球员。获得欧洲资格将降低这些球员在今年夏天对潜在买家的吸引力。

title: Who are the record Champions League goalscorers?
summary: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team identifies which players have scored the most goals in Champions League history. The article provides an overview of the competition's most prolific scorers across all eras.
content: Our Ask Me Anything team looks at which players have scored the most goals in the Champions League.

zh.summary: BBC体育的"问我任何事"团队确定了欧冠历史上进球最多的球员。该文章概述了该赛事各个时代最高产的得分手。

title: How to follow the Premier League on the BBC this weekend
summary: BBC Sport Ask Me Anything explains how viewers can follow Premier League matches on BBC platforms during the upcoming weekend. The guide provides comprehensive information on broadcast options and where to watch games.
content: BBC Sport Ask Me Anything explains how to follow the Premier League on the BBC this week.

zh.title: 这个周末如何在BBC上观看英超联赛
zh.summary: BBC体育的"问我任何事"解释了观众如何在BBC平台上观看即将到来的周末英超联赛。该指南提供了有关广播选项和观看比赛地点的全面信息。

title: Play-off pending? How a draw at the Etihad could set up thrilling finale
summary: Manchester City's match against Arsenal could be pivotal in deciding the Premier League title destination. The fixture has the potential to set up a thrilling final day of the season.
content: Man City's meeting against Arsenal may go a long way to deciding the destination of the Premier League trophy in May, but how close a finish could it be?

zh.title: 附加赛待定？伊蒂哈德球场的平局如何为精彩决赛铺路
zh.summary: 曼城与阿森纳的比赛可能对英超冠军归属的决定起到关键作用。这场比赛有可能为赛季的最后一天带来扣人心弦的对阵。

title: £124m spent but Newcastle no closer to striker solution
summary: Newcastle United has spent £124 million attempting to replace striker Alexander Isak. Manager Eddie Howe's side remains without an adequate striking solution despite the significant investment.
content: Newcastle United spent £124m to replace departing Alexander Isak, but Eddie Howe's men now seem no closer to finding their striking solution.

zh.title: 花费1.24亿英镑但纽卡斯尔离前锋解决方案依然遥远
zh.summary: 纽卡斯尔联队已花费1.24亿英镑试图替换前锋亚历山大·伊萨克。尽管投入巨资，主教练埃迪·豪的球队仍然没有找到充分的前锋解决方案。

title: UCL talking points: Slot's bizarre choices, Bayern now favorites?
summary: ESPN's team of analysts discuss key moments from Champions League quarterfinal second legs, including Arne Slot's controversial Alexander Isak starting decision. Bayern Munich's strong performance is analyzed amid debate over their title credentials.
content: Arne Slot's decision to start Alexander Isak backfired, badly. ESPN's Julien Laurens, Sam Marsden, Gab Marcotti and Sam Tighe weigh in on that and all the other moments that mattered from the UCL quarterfinal second legs.

zh.title: 欧冠热点话题：斯洛特的离奇选择，拜仁现在是热门人选？
zh.summary: ESPN的分析团队讨论欧冠四分之一决赛次回合的关键时刻，包括阿尔内·斯洛特备受争议的亚历山大·伊萨克首发决定。在关于夺冠资格的辩论中分析了拜仁慕尼黑的强劲表现。

title: Kane hails 'special night' as Bayern oust Madrid
summary: Bayern Munich defeated Real Madrid 4-3 in a dramatic Champions League quarterfinal second leg, with late goals proving decisive. Harry Kane praised the 'special night' as Bayern advanced to face Paris Saint-Germain in the semifinals.
content: Harry Kane hailed a "special night" as late goals powered Bayern Munich to a 4-3 victory, eliminating Real Madrid for the first time since 2012 and securing a ticket to the Champions League semifinals.

zh.title: 凯恩赞叹"特殊之夜" 拜仁淘汰皇马
zh.summary: 拜仁慕尼黑在欧冠四分之一决赛次回合中以4-3战胜皇家马德里，晚期进球起到了决定性作用。哈里·凯恩赞叹这个"特殊之夜"，拜仁晋级半决赛面对巴黎圣日耳曼。

title: After Real Madrid's UCL comeback falls short, can their project be salvaged?
summary: Real Madrid suffered elimination from the Champions League after losing to Bayern Munich in a dramatic quarter-final, raising questions about the viability of their project moving forward.
content: Big questions lie ahead for Real Madrid following their defeat to Bayern Munich in an instant Champions League classic.

zh.title: 皇马欧冠梦碎，他们的项目还能被拯救吗？
zh.summary: 皇马在欧冠四分之一决赛中不敌拜仁慕尼黑遭淘汰，这引发了人们对皇马前景是否可行的质疑。

title: While other giants fire, Arteta's Arsenal continues to flicker in the background
summary: Arsenal advanced to the Champions League semi-finals with a 0-0 draw against Sporting, but their inconsistent performances throughout the season have left their future prospects uncertain.
content: Arsenal eked out a 0-0 draw against Sporting on Wednesday, which was enough to carry them through to the UCL semis, but their season very much remains in the balance.

zh.title: 当其他豪门火力全开时，阿尔特塔的阿森纳在背后暗淡
zh.summary: 阿森纳与葡萄牙体育队0-0战平，晋级欧冠半决赛，但整个赛季表现不一致，未来前景堪忧。

title: Arteta tells Arsenal fans to enjoy, not criticize
summary: After reaching the Champions League semi-finals, Mikel Arteta urged Arsenal fans to appreciate their achievement rather than focus on ongoing criticism of the team's form.
content: Mikel Arteta has urged Arsenal fans to "enjoy where we are" after reaching the Champions League semifinals amid criticism of their performances.

zh.title: 阿尔特塔敦促阿森纳球迷欣赏而非批评
zh.summary: 在晋级欧冠半决赛后，米克尔·阿尔特塔敦促阿森纳球迷欣赏球队的成就，而不是关注对球队表现的持续批评。

title: Beckham: Miami won't rush head coach search
summary: Inter Miami co-owner David Beckham indicated the club will take its time finding the right replacement for departing head coach Javier Mascherano.
content: Inter Miami co-owner David Beckham said his team will be patient in the search for a new coach following the departure of Javier Mascherano.

zh.title: 贝克汉姆：迈阿密不会仓促寻找主教练
zh.summary: Inter Miami共同所有人大卫·贝克汉姆表示，俱乐部将花时间为即将离任的主教练哈维尔·马斯切拉诺寻找合适的替代者。

title: 'Joke': Madrid fume at costly red card in UCL exit
summary: Real Madrid's coaching staff and players criticized Eduardo Camavinga's red card as the decisive factor in their Champions League quarter-final elimination by Bayern Munich.
content: Coach Álvaro Arbeloa said it was "obvious" that Eduardo Camavinga's red card was crucial in Real Madrid's Champions League quarterfinal elimination by Bayern Munich on Wednesday, while midfielder Jude Bellingham called the decision "a joke."

zh.title: "荒唐"：皇马对欧冠出局的昂贵红牌感到愤怒
zh.summary: 皇家马德里的教练组和球员批评埃杜阿尔多·卡马温加的红牌是他们在欧冠四分之一决赛中被拜仁慕尼黑淘汰的决定性因素。

title: Bayern oust Madrid in UCL classic; PSG up next
summary: Bayern Munich completed a stunning Champions League quarter-final comeback with a 4-3 victory over Real Madrid, eliminating the competition's record 15-time champions and advancing to face PSG in the semi-finals.
content: Bayern Munich scored two late goals to knock record 15-time European champions Real Madrid out of the Champions League following a thrilling 4-3 win at the Allianz Arena on Wednesday.

zh.title: 拜仁在欧冠大战中淘汰皇马；PSG即将登场
zh.summary: 拜仁慕尼黑以4-3击败皇家马德里，完成了欧冠四分之一决赛的惊人逆转，淘汰了这项赛事的纪录保持者15次冠军，并晋级半决赛对阵PSG。

title: FIFA prez: Iran 'for sure' will play at World Cup
summary: FIFA President Gianni Infantino confirmed Iran will participate in this summer's World Cup despite ongoing geopolitical tensions with the United States.
content: FIFA president Gianni Infantino said Wednesday that Iran would "for sure" be at the World Cup this summer, despite the ongoing war with the United States.

zh.title: FIFA主席：伊朗"肯定会"参加世界杯
zh.summary: 国际足联主席詹尼·因凡蒂诺证实，尽管与美国存在持续的地缘政治紧张关系，伊朗将参加今年夏天的世界杯。

title: Messi hit with $7M lawsuit over missed friendly
summary: A Miami-based event promoter has filed a $7 million lawsuit against Lionel Messi and the Argentine Football Association, claiming fraud and breach of contract over a missed exhibition match.
content: A Miami-based event promoter has filed a $7 million lawsuit against Lionel Messi and the Argentine Football Association, alleging fraud and breach of contract after the star sat out an exhibition match last October.

zh.title: 梅西因错过友谊赛遭起诉700万美元
zh.summary: 一名迈阿密的活动推广人对莱昂内尔·梅西和阿根廷足球协会提起700万美元诉讼，声称他们因取消表演赛而存在欺诈和违约行为。

title: Arteta wanted fire but Arsenal limp to semis - does style matter?
summary: Arsenal delivered a lackluster performance but secured the necessary result to advance to the Champions League semi-finals, prompting questions about whether style matters in knockout competitions.
content: Mikel Arteta wanted "fire" from his Arsenal players but instead got a sluggish performance as the Gunners did what was needed to reach the Champions League semi-finals.

zh.title: 阿尔特塔期待火热但阿森纳艰难晋级半决赛——风格重要吗？
zh.summary: 阿森纳表现不佳但确保了晋级欧冠半决赛所需的比赛结果，这引发了关于风格在淘汰赛中是否重要的问题。
